use_codes.desc: USE IN PATIENTS WITH REVERSIBLE AIRWAY OBSTRUCTION
TREATMENT OF PATIENTS SUFFERING FROM A LATE ASTHMATIC REACTION OR LATE PHASE ASTHMA

indications.text:
1.1 Treatment of Asthma
SEREVENT DISKUS is indicated for the treatment of asthma and in the prevention of
bronchospasm only as concomitant therapy with an ICS in patients aged 4 years and older with
reversible obstructive airway disease, including patients with symptoms of nocturnal asthma.
